results.title: Advanced Micro Devices Analyst Ratings and Price Targets | NASDAQ:AMD | Benzinga
AMD Downgraded by Northland Capital Markets -- Rating Changed to Market Perform
results.summary: On April 27, 2026, AMD was downgraded by Northland Capital Markets to Market Perform from Outperform by analyst Gus Richard, with price target $260.

results.title: Earnings Eve Warning: Top Analyst Downgrades AMD Stock on Valuation Concerns, Sees 5%+ Downside Risk
results.summary: An analyst downgraded AMD to Hold from Buy citing stretched valuation given production limits.

results.title: This AMD Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Monday
DA Davidson analyst resets AMD stock price target for 2026 - TheStreet
results.summary: DA Davidson upgraded AMD to Buy with $375 price target; raised 2026 revenue estimate by $2B after Intel Q1 results.

results.title: SA analyst upgrades/downgrades: PLTR, AMD, MAT, PINS | Seeking Alpha
results.summary: Envision Research upgraded AMD to Buy citing superior positioning in agentic AI infrastructure market.
